item.title: Network Switching
item.author: Author
item.description: Switching Diagram How to Connect A and B? Scenario Setting PC A Check Ethernet List 1 ip link Assign IP Address to eth0 that is connected with the Switch 1 ip addr add 192.168.1.10/24 dev eth0 Setting PC B Check Ethernet List 1 ip link Assign IP Address to eth0 that is connected with the Switch 1 ip addr add 192.
